description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style filing cabinet with a boxy, rectangular form and a metallic exterior. The surface is slightly worn, showing subtle stains and scuffs, suggesting frequent use or exposure to an urban environment. One side features a prominent yellow warning sign with a black exclamation mark, indicating the presence of important or hazardous contents. Another side displays a vertical row of rivets or bolts, reinforcing the cabinet's sturdy construction. The top of the cabinet has a warning label, further emphasizing its secure or sensitive nature. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with muted gray and metallic tones dominating the finish.
description: A sturdy, metallic filing cabinet with warning labels and a reinforced, industrial look. It features a warning sign, riveted panel, and a worn, utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: This view shows the top and one side of the cabinet, with a visible warning label on the top surface and a plain, slightly stained side panel.
description_view_1: This side is plain and unmarked, with visible wear and subtle stains, lacking any warning signs or rivets.
description_view_2: The front features a large yellow warning sign with a black exclamation mark, making it the most visually distinct and likely the primary access side.
description_view_3: This side displays a vertical row of metallic rivets or bolts, suggesting reinforced construction, along with a warning label on the top.
